name: Godwin Edgar Opuka
summary: Full-Stack Solutions Architect, AI/ML Engineer, and Financial Engineer with proven experience designing and delivering end-to-end intelligent systems — from backend data pipelines and API layers through to React-based frontends and graph-powered analytics. Currently serving as Solutions Architect at DigitalQatalyst, owning the full development lifecycle of enterprise-scale digital platforms built on Neo4j, GraphQL/REST APIs, and MACH architecture principles. MSc Financial Engineering candidate at WorldQuant University with a strong quantitative foundation spanning stochastic calculus, derivative pricing, and ML in finance.

education.notes: Coursework: Financial Data, Financial Markets, Derivative Pricing, Financial Econometrics, Stochastic Modeling, Machine Learning in Finance, Deep Learning for Finance. Currently enrolled: Portfolio Management. Remaining: Risk Management, Capstone.

education.institution: Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology (JKUAT)
education.notes: Mathematically intensive program covering Stochastic Calculus, Derivative Pricing, Game Theory, Statistical Inference, Linear Algebra, Numerical Methods, and Financial Theory.

experience.title: Solutions Architect & BI Lead
bullets: Architecting the Twin Graph Manager — a graph-powered digital business platform modeling enterprise digital twins using Neo4j and graph data science
Designing and building full-stack platform architecture: Neo4j graph backend, GraphQL/REST API layer, Redux state management, and React component-driven frontend
Implementing microservices patterns and MACH-aligned architecture for platform scalability, composability, and extensibility
Architecting a full-stack Digital Intelligence & Analytics solution delivering descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, prescriptive, and deep intelligence capabilities
Building API-first data services (REST & GraphQL) with enterprise governance standards
Built graph-based intelligence solutions using Neo4j for relationship-centric analytics and decision intelligence
Oversaw enterprise architecture modeling using Ardoq and Abacus to align business capabilities with digital platforms
Directed deployment of AI agents for business process automation across multiple domains
Orchestrated migration of dashboards from Power BI to React-based solutions

experience.title: Full-Stack Data Developer | AI/ML Engineer
bullets: Engineered end-to-end data pipelines using Python, R, Spark, and Microsoft Fabric
Developed and deployed ML-powered services with REST and GraphQL API endpoints including React frontend integration layers
Designed feature engineering pipelines for predictive analytics and AI-driven products
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines for data, ML, and application workloads using Azure DevOps

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Delivered quantitative and qualitative analytical solutions across finance and business domains
Conducted financial statement analysis and hypothesis testing using robust statistical methods
Generated actionable insights through advanced data modeling and research methodologies

experience.title: Claims Analyst (Intern)
bullets: Supported claims processing and analysis in insurance operations

experience.title: Asset Management Analyst (Intern)
bullets: Supported asset tracking and management reporting for county government assets

experience.title: Business Development Associate (Intern)
bullets: Supported business development initiatives and client engagement activities

projects.name: Market Signal Graph
projects.description: Next-generation financial research tool combining vector search (pgvector on PostgreSQL) with graph data science (Neo4j) to uncover hidden market signals and surface non-obvious relationships in financial data.

projects.name: High-Performance Derivatives Pricing Engine
projects.description: Implemented mathematical pricing models in Rust with a FastAPI backend to compute derivative prices at high performance, bridging quantitative finance theory with production-grade engineering.

projects.name: Job Hunter KE
projects.description: Automated job application SaaS for the Kenyan market — scrapes listings, generates tailored CVs and cover letters using AI, and routes them through an n8n-powered review and dispatch workflow.

technical: Machine Learning Pipelines, Feature Engineering, Model Deployment
Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, Azure Data Factory
Stochastic Calculus, Derivative Pricing, Monte Carlo Simulation
GARCH, LSTM, Deep Learning for Finance

notable_achievements: Promoted from Full-Stack Data Developer to Solutions Architect & BI Lead at DigitalQatalyst within 3 months (Sep 2025)
Architected Enterprise Architecture IP solution automating digital transformation through graph-powered analysis of digital capabilities
Led full dashboard modernization — migrated Power BI solutions to React-based platforms for enterprise integration
